query: ok so apple keeps rejecting my app and im not sure why anymore. can u look thru the project and tell me whats gonna get bounced next time? its react native, lives in /apps/mobile
Run an App Store readiness audit on this Expo project before I submit to TestFlight tomorrow morning
Is my app 4.8 compliant? I just added Google sign-in to the iOS build last week and i havent touched siwa yet
we ship to ios next thursday and im paranoid. given the recent changes around required reason apis and the privacy manifest stuff, will apple bounce us if i submit as is?
just integrated mixpanel into the swiftui app for product analytics, want to make sure the ATT prompt and Info.plist usage strings are set up the way apple wants em

we're switching some of our digital subscriptions from in-app purchase to stripe checkout since stripe is way cheaper. before i merge — can you confirm thats actually allowed under the current app store rules or are we asking for a rejection?
before i archive and upload to app store connect, can you do a pre flight on this Flutter codebase? mainly worried about the privacy manifest, account deletion, and our analytics setup

audit just 5.1 (privacy) for this capacitor app — we collect a fair amount of analytics + crash logs and i dont know if our privacy nutrition labels in app store connect actually match what the code does
i added account creation via firebase auth to my ios app, anything else i need to do to keep apple happy when i submit?
check this repo against the app store review guidelines and tell me what would get rejected — its an ios native swift app, we use revenuecat for subs and firebase analytics

can u do a code review of the ios networking layer in /apps/mobile/ios/Networking/APIClient.swift? im worried about the retry logic and the timeout handling — looks like we retry on 500s which seems wrong
need help calling the App Store Connect API to fetch yesterdays downloads + revenue and pipe them into our internal grafana dashboard — fastlane is too heavy for this one job
im publishing to google play tomorrow and the play console keeps yelling about the data safety form. can you cross check what i marked in the form vs what the code actually does?
show me how to add Sign in with Apple to my Next.js + Supabase web app, the apple docs are kinda confusing and the next-auth provider keeps throwing invalid_client
help me debug why my macOS app's hardened runtime is rejecting the binary at launch — error 0x10000003 in Console.app, it was working fine before i upgraded to xcode 16
walk me through how to actually wire up StoreKit 2 subscriptions in a SwiftUI app — i have the product IDs configured in app store connect already, just need the swift code for purchasing + restore
rewrite my app store listing description to sound less corporate, current draft is in marketing/store/description.txt — keep it under 4000 chars and dont lose the keywords
is my apple pay integration in the checkout flow set up right? the payment sheet shows up but the merchant validation step keeps failing with errorCode 0
my swiftui list re-renders the entire view tree every time the user types in the search bar, even tho the data didnt change. can you find the leak? code in HomeView.swift
draft a privacy policy for my saas — we collect emails, ip addresses, and usage analytics via posthog. needs to be ccpa + gdpr compliant
